WITN04380100
WITN04380100

58. I would like to conclude this statement by once again expressing my heartfelt
sympathies to all those so terribly affected by these miscarriages of justice. I also
re-iterate my willingness to assist this Inquiry with any further topics, if it is thought
that I could be of any help.

Statement of Truth

I believe the content of this statement to be true.

Signed: GRO
Dated: 28.02.2024
